title: Ad Tetra!
description: Adds compatability between Tetra and Ad Astra! by allowing the use of the metals and woods in Ad Astra to be made into Tetra tools
body:
Adds compatability between Tetra and Ad Astra! by allowing the use of the metals and woods in Ad Astra to be made into Tetra tools.

![The stats for the materials Calorite, Desh, Ostrum. and Glacian wood](https://i.imgur.com/NbFV3JM.png)
